title: Is it possible to display the board a mirror column is connecting to
excerpt: Is it possible to display the board that a mirror column is connecting to? We’re finding that setting up mirror connections is a key source of potential error. The mirror connection gives the name of the item it’s connec…

posts.author: StephRH (Steph King)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to display the board that a mirror column is connecting to? We’re finding that setting up mirror connections is a key source of potential error. The mirror connection gives the name of the item it’s connecting to, but not the board. We’d like to display both to minimise the risk of a board error slipping through unnoticed.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @StephRH,

You can specifically choose to mirror the board name in an additional mirror column, if this could work for you?

posts.author: tanner_elevate (Tanner Nelson | Elevate Operations)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @StephRH!

We usually include the name of the board in the column description of the mirrored column

Tanner

posts.author: greg_elevate (Gregory Thomson)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’ve used this solution before on our own boards! Let us know if you need any help getting it set up.
